Desert Runs & Trail Events

BeginnerModerateAdvancedExtreme

Discover SoCal's Best Trails

Your guide to Southern California's off-road destinations. From desert dunes to mountain ridges, find your next adventure.

22
Trails Mapped
4
Difficulty Levels
SoCal
All Southern CA
🟢 Beginner🟡 Moderate🟠 Advanced🔴 Extreme
🟢

Beginner Trails

Stock 4WD vehicles welcome. Perfect for first-timers and families.

Cleghorn Ridge Trail

Easy to Moderate
Cajon Pass, San Bernardino County
12 miles 3-4 hours

Scenic ridge trail with optional harder sections. Great introduction to off-roading with stunning views of the Cajon Pass.

MountainBeginner FriendlyFire RoadScenic Views
Open in ONXGoogle Maps

Coxey Road

Easy
Anza-Borrego Desert State Park, CA
15 miles 2-3 hours

An easy desert road leading to historical sites within Anza-Borrego. Beautiful in spring with wildflowers.

DesertHistoricWildflowers
Open in ONXGoogle Maps

Idyllwild Mountain Road

Easy
Idyllwild, CA
18 miles 2-3 hours

A scenic drive through the mountains to Idyllwild. Paved and dirt sections with beautiful pine forest.

MountainScenicPine Forest
Open in ONXGoogle Maps

Mojave Road (West/Central)

Easy to Moderate
Mojave National Preserve, San Bernardino County
140 miles (full) Multi-day

Historic pioneer route across the Mojave Desert. Well-graded sections perfect for beginners. Stunning desert landscapes.

DesertHistoricMulti-day
Open in ONXGoogle Maps
🟡

Moderate Trails

All-terrain tires recommended. Some ground clearance and 4WD experience helpful.

Berdoo Canyon Trail

Moderate
Joshua Tree National Park, CA
20 miles 4-5 hours

A scenic desert trail with unique rock formations through Joshua Tree National Park.

DesertScenicJoshua Trees
Open in ONXGoogle Maps

Borrego Mountain Wash Trail

Moderate
Anza-Borrego Desert State Park, CA
12 miles 3-4 hours

A moderate desert trail through a wash, often good after rain. Leads to impressive slot canyons.

DesertWash TrailSlot Canyons
Open in ONXGoogle Maps

Dumont Dunes

Moderate to Extreme
Near Baker, CA
Varies Full Day

Famous for dune buggying and sand rail riding. Some areas are extreme - know your limits.

Sand DunesOHVCamping
Open in ONXGoogle Maps

Holcomb Creek Trail

Moderate to Advanced
Big Bear, CA
8 miles 3-4 hours

A challenging but rewarding rock crawling trail in the Big Bear area with creek crossings.

Rock CrawlMountainCreek Crossings
Open in ONXGoogle Maps

Jack North Trail

Moderate
San Bernardino Mountains, CA
10 miles 3-4 hours

A moderate mountain trail with scenic views through pine forest.

MountainScenicForest
Open in ONXGoogle Maps

Ocotillo Wells SVRA

Moderate
Ocotillo, CA
100+ miles of trails Varies

Vast desert playground with sand dunes and trails for all skill levels. Camping available.

Sand DunesDesertOHV
Open in ONXGoogle Maps

Odessa-Doran Loop

Moderate
Johnson Valley, CA
25 miles 4-6 hours

A popular loop trail in Johnson Valley. Some sections used in King of the Hammers race.

DesertLoopKing of the Hammers
Open in ONXGoogle Maps

Rainbow Trail

Moderate
San Bernardino Mountains, CA
15 miles 4-5 hours

A scenic trail with great views and moderate obstacles through the San Bernardino Mountains.

MountainScenicRocky
Open in ONXGoogle Maps

Thimble Trail

Moderate
Ocotillo Wells SVRA, CA
12 miles 3-4 hours

A moderate trail with rocky sections in Ocotillo Wells. Some technical spots.

DesertRockTechnical
Open in ONXGoogle Maps

Thomas Mountain Road

Moderate
Idyllwild, CA
20 miles 4-5 hours

A moderate climb with expansive views of the San Jacinto Valley.

MountainScenic ClimbHigh Altitude
Open in ONXGoogle Maps

Truckhaven Trail

Moderate
Ocotillo Wells SVRA, CA
15 miles 3-4 hours

A popular desert trail known for its sandy sections and fun washes.

DesertSandWashes
Open in ONXGoogle Maps
🟠

Advanced Trails

Lift kit and skid plates recommended. Rock sliders and quality tires essential.

Arrowhead North Loop

Moderate to Advanced
Lake Arrowhead, CA
18 miles 4-6 hours

A scenic loop trail around Lake Arrowhead with some challenging rocky sections.

MountainLoopScenicRocky
Open in ONXGoogle Maps

Big Johnson Trail

Moderate to Advanced
San Bernardino, CA
12 miles 4-5 hours

A moderate to advanced trail featuring rocky terrain and technical sections.

MountainRockyTechnical
Open in ONXGoogle Maps

Gold Fever Trail

Moderate
Big Bear, CA
14 miles 4-5 hours

Follow the path of gold prospectors in this historic mountain trail with mine ruins.

MountainHistoric MinesRocky
Open in ONXGoogle Maps

John Bull Trail

Advanced
Holcomb Valley, Big Bear, CA
6 miles 3-5 hours

Serious rock crawling with optional bypasses. Skids and lockers strongly recommended. Body damage possible.

Rock CrawlChallengingSkids Required
Open in ONXGoogle Maps

San Jacinto Ridge Trail

Advanced
San Jacinto Mountains, CA
16 miles 5-7 hours

A strenuous trail along the San Jacinto ridge with incredible views. High altitude - bring water.

MountainChallengingHigh AltitudeEpic Views
Open in ONXGoogle Maps
🔴

Extreme Trails

Built rigs only. Lockers, armor, and experience mandatory. Body damage highly likely.

Outer Limits Trail

Extreme
Johnson Valley, CA
8 miles 4-8 hours

Known for its extreme rock obstacles and challenges. Part of King of the Hammers course. Winch mandatory.

Rock CrawlExtremeWinch RequiredKing of the Hammers
Open in ONXGoogle Maps

RC3331 Rattlesnake Canyon

Extreme
San Bernardino Mountains, CA
7 miles 5-8 hours

Severe rock gardens, ledges, and tight squeezes. Winch likely needed. Not for the faint of heart. Full armor required.

Rock CrawlSevereWinch RequiredBody Damage Likely
Open in ONXGoogle Maps

🛠️ Recovery Resources

Stuck, broken, or need a tow? These folks have your back. All volunteers — be respectful and compensate for their time/fuel.

SoCal Crwlr

Recovery Service

All SoCal OHV Areas

WinchTow StrapsHi-LiftRecovery Rig
@socal_crwlr

Rugged Repair

Mobile Tech

Trail-Side Repairs & Recovery

@rugged_repair
